feature_files.description: Main Journey builder UI and QA read-only/locking gate in the canvas layout.
Barrel export for editor modules.
Client-side canvas persistence and QA snapshot saving/migration; injects readOnly into QA snapshots.
Frontend API helpers for journeys (canvas, images, share, QA, export, validation).
Fetches journeys list for the current workspace.
Barrel export for hooks.
Type definitions for Journey node data and QA verification attachment shapes.
Step node UI including screenshot upload and image rendering with legacy/proxy URL handling.
Trigger node UI for connecting events and rendering QA-related verification UI.
Annotation highlight/draw/resizing node UI driven by node sizing and CSS variables.
Sticky note node UI.
React Flow handle and node UI affordances.
Barrel export for nodes.
Quick-add context menu overlay for node insertion.
Start new QA run modal; simplified UX disables editable fields and omits environment input.
Warning modal shown before saving QA when some steps are still Pending.
Fullscreen/modal viewer for QA proofs.
Barrel export for overlays.
Uploads step screenshots via multipart FormData to `POST /api/journeys/:id/images`.
Transforms uploaded proof files into the `QAProof` object structure.
Centralized QA Run naming formatter and derived QA status computation (PASSED/FAILED/PENDING).
Barrel export for Journey libs.
Placeholder barrel export for journeys page modules.
Placeholder barrel export for QA modules.

routes_pages.description: Detects public share/brief URLs and mounts shared views.
Workspace key routing (`/w/<workspace_key>/...`) and route syncing for journeys.
Authenticated journey builder page wiring canvas + QA selector + share toggle.
Public read-only shared journey renderer; supports journey/brief/QA modes and QA run selection.
Fetches and renders implementation brief HTML for shared brief URLs.

services_api_backend.description: Express app mounting journeys and shared routers and providing `/api/health`.
Authenticated contracts: canvas, images, share, QA persistence/load, export, and validation.
Public contracts: shared journey JSON, rewritten image streaming, shared HTML export, QA runs.
DAL for journeys CRUD plus saving canvas JSON and syncing `journey_events`.
DAL for QA run persistence and reconstruction of frontend QARun objects.
DAL for event property attachments used by snippet and export generation.
Builds codegen snippets for events (dataLayer, Bloomreach SDK, Bloomreach API).
Standalone HTML export engine for implementation briefs (includes annotation overlays).

store_state.description: Zustand store containing derived `mainData.journeys` and active workspace identification.

types_schemas.description: Frontend types including QARun endedAt/locking and QA verification shapes.
Backend DB row typings mirrored to SQL schema.
SQL schema for journeys + QA runs/payloads and security policies.
Adds canvas JSONB columns and testing instructions markdown.
Security and membership policies impacting access to journeys/QA.

utils_constants.description: Authenticated fetch wrapper; special-cases FormData to avoid incorrect Content-Type.
Environment constants `API_BASE` and `SUPABASE_URL` for public Storage URL rewriting.
Tailwind/theme tokens including `--annotation-*` palette used by annotation nodes.
Serializes tracking plan + journeys + QA into portable structures.
HTML helper functions used by handoff/brief generation.

backend_api.purpose: Persist React Flow nodes/edges and sync trigger nodes -> journey_events.
Homepage journeys list enriched with QA summary (`qaRunsCount` + `latestQARun`) for derived QA status.
Upload step screenshot to Supabase Storage (public objects expected).
Generate implementation brief HTML for the internal builder.
Persist QA run metadata, snapshot, and per-node verifications.
Load QA runs + verifications for the current workspace.
Load shared journey nodes/edges with image URL rewriting, eventSnippets, and qaRuns.
Load shared journey by share-enabled journey id.
Serve standalone implementation brief HTML export in public mode.
Stream shared step screenshot images for the public shared view.

canvasState: React Flow nodes/edges managed by `useJourneyCanvas` and persisted on Save Layout.
qaState: QA runs list and active run selection in `src/pages/Journeys.tsx` (local state + store update).
QA gating derived via `activeQARun.endedAt` plus in-session `lockedQARunIds` to produce `qaLocked` and `effectiveReadOnly`.

storageBuckets: journey-images (public objects expected for shared + export image rendering)
contracts: marker-based reconstruction of QA meta/nodes/edges in `qa_run_payloads` (see `qa.dal.ts`)
legacy image proxy URL pattern supported in export via `normalizeStepImageUrlForExport` and in client via normalization helpers.

sharedImageRewriting: Backend `routes/shared.ts` rewrites step node `data.imageUrl` to shared image proxy endpoint.
sharedEventSnippets: Backend `routes/shared.ts` builds `eventSnippets` via `codegen.service.ts` using event property presence lists.

knownIssues: Image URL normalization is high-risk: legacy proxy URLs and duplicated path segments must be normalized consistently across canvas save, shared rendering, and HTML export.
QA marker reconstruction is fragile if marker payloads (meta/nodes/edges) are missing or malformed for older runs.
Homepage QA status is derived from `latestQARun` reconstructed in `GET /api/journeys`; if that payload is partially missing, status falls back to PENDING (derived logic in `qaRunUtils.ts`).
incompleteAreas: No automated tests were found for Journeys flows; regression detection relies on manual QA.
Some export/handoff HTML generation uses inline styles/colors (implementation detail); may drift from the semantic design system.
QA run derived naming/status logic was centralized into `qaRunUtils.ts`, but unit tests were not added yet.
nextSteps: Add a regression checklist for image loading + shared view QA snippets + annotation overlays in exported HTML.
Harden `qa.dal.ts` reconstruction with explicit validation + structured logs when marker payloads are missing.
Add unit tests for URL normalization helpers and QA reconstruction parsing.
resumeChecklist: Follow Save/QA calls from `useJourneyCanvas.ts` to `useJourneysApi.ts` to backend routes `src/backend/routes/journeys.ts`.
For shared mode, follow `SharedJourneyView.tsx` to backend `src/backend/routes/shared.ts` and DAL `src/backend/dal/qa.dal.ts`.
Do not break: QA marker payload reconstruction contract + shared image URL rewriting contract.
Verify end-to-end: (1) Save Layout persists canvas, (2) step images load in shared view without auth, (3) QA runs load in shared view and show code snippets for triggers.
Verify QA workflow safeguards: Save QA modal shows loading state, End QA is blocked when pending steps exist, and mode dropdowns display Design/Docs with icons plus lock/open state for QA runs.
Verify no floating QA overlay remains on canvas and that Save/End/Status/Counts are available directly in QA Run Details panel.
Verify active QA Tester field is locked and auto-filled from authenticated user email.
